title: CallContext
description: Payload the CCaaS Agent Desktop emits when the human agent hands off a call to the AI Agent (Agent365 → Foundry agent + CUA). Becomes the basis of the prefill JSON delivered to the legacy app.

request_id.description: Unique request ID for this handoff. Echoed in ready/result/error so the CCaaS desktop can correlate.

caller_phone.description: US phone number in (NPA) NXX-XXXX format. Used to look up the policy in the legacy app.

policy_number.description: Optional. If known (e.g., caller provided it on the IVR), passed through so the legacy app can search by policy.

intent.description: Coarse intent classified by the CCaaS desktop (or simulated).

summary.description: Short natural-language summary of the call so far, used as the seed narrative for the FNOL.

transcript_excerpt.description: Optional last ~30 seconds of transcript for the Foundry agent to ground on.

requested_by.description: The human contact-center agent who initiated the handoff.

timestamp.description: When the handoff was initiated (ISO 8601 UTC).

target_backend.description: Which AI backend the presenter routed this handoff to (the desktop backend toggle). Consumers that drive the Cloud PC via Computer Use (e.g. the Foundry + W365A runner) MUST ignore a handoff not addressed to them, so two agents never drive the app at once. Omitted = legacy/unaddressed (any single configured consumer may act).

examples.summary: Rear-ended at intersection of 5th and Main, no injuries reported, both vehicles drivable.
examples.transcript_excerpt: Caller: ...about 2:30 this afternoon, I was stopped at the light at 5th and Main and a Honda Civic rear-ended me. No one was hurt. Both cars can still be driven.
